CMCSA.name: Comcast
CMCSA.live_note: investors.comcast.com does not resolve (NXDOMAIN). Webcast platform Q4Inc (events.q4inc.com) is a JS-only SPA with auth-gated API. Live stream URL not discoverable without a running browser. Replay path is the pilot.
CMCSA.webcast_url_note: Event-specific URL disclosed in Business Wire press release ~4 weeks before call. Must be captured manually and added to replay_url when available.
CMCSA.replay_url_note: Populate with the Q4Inc attendee URL from the July 23 2026 press release once Comcast publishes it.
